alert_policy.description: Escalation and cooldown policy for safety notices.

door_camera_video.description: Approved facility video stream or bundled demo feed.

monitored_zone.description: Facility zone or camera context reviewers care about.

contract.summary: Use this blueprint to watch an approved camera stream, detect visible people, summarize what is observable, and raise safety alerts with a reviewable event trail.
users: Facilities, security, safety operations, and property management teams.

description: Use this blueprint to watch an approved camera stream, detect visible people, summarize what is observable, and raise safety alerts with a reviewable event trail.

rules.message: video_source.uri must be an rtsp:// or rtsps:// URL.
rules.name: video_source_uri_rtsp

metadata.customizable_for: Door monitoring, restricted-area alerts, retail safety, warehouse operations.
metadata.description: Use this blueprint to watch an approved camera stream, detect visible people, summarize what is observable, and raise safety alerts with a reviewable event trail.

human_control.reason: The workflow may surface notable findings for review but does not apply irreversible actions by itself.

fields.description: Facility camera or video stream URI. Default is a local RTSP/H.264 camera stream.
fields.label: Video source

fields.description: Base URL for the Ollama-compatible vision-language model server.
fields.label: VL model URL

fields.description: Vision-language model name used to understand sampled video frames.
fields.label: VL model name

fields.description: Run mode used for mock, test, or real-adapter execution.
fields.label: Run mode

fields.description: Input source adapter. Mock is safe for demos; real inputs use json, file, env_json, streams, or connector profiles.
fields.label: Input adapter

fields.description: Local run-store root for logs, events, inputs, outputs, and final artifacts.
fields.label: Run-store root

fields.description: Whether this blueprint disables human control, emits notice-only events, or requires approval for high-impact actions.
fields.label: Human control mode

fields.description: Whether the shared run-store dashboard should be available for this run.
fields.label: Web UI

fields.description: LLM endpoint used by LLM-backed agents.
fields.label: LLM API base

fields.description: LLM model used by LLM-backed agents.
fields.label: LLM model

fields.description: Live or replayed stream endpoint consumed by the blueprint.
fields.label: door_camera_video stream

fields.description: Enable only after the connector destination and credentials are approved.
fields.label: websocket_events output

fields.description: Connector destination reference; secrets must remain outside blueprint config.
fields.label: websocket_events destination

init_config_review.instruction: When running in OtterDesk, show these overwriteable fields during init config and ask the user to change them or keep the defaults before launch.

input_contract.description: Use this blueprint to watch an approved camera stream, detect visible people, summarize what is observable, and raise safety alerts with a reviewable event trail.

file.description: JSON object loaded from a local file path.

json.description: Inline JSON object supplied through config or runtime overrides.

live_stream.description: Runtime stream configuration used for live or replayed stream inputs.

mock.description: Default synthetic inputs bundled with the blueprint.

required_inputs.description: Approved facility video stream or bundled demo feed.
required_inputs.name: door_camera_video

required_inputs.description: Facility zone or camera context reviewers care about.
required_inputs.name: monitored_zone

required_inputs.description: Escalation and cooldown policy for safety notices.
required_inputs.name: alert_policy

validation_rules.message: video_source.uri must be an rtsp:// or rtsps:// URL.
validation_rules.name: video_source_uri_rtsp

artifacts.description: Stable run-store files and domain-specific outputs.

human.description: Sparse human collaboration notices, input requests, and responses.

input_skills.description: Connector-backed or reusable skill-backed input sources.

inputs.description: Resolved runtime inputs and adapter provenance.

logs.description: Runtime stdout/stderr and explicit log artifacts.

output_skills.description: Optional fan-out destinations after local run-store writes.

outputs.description: Primary result and final user-facing artifact.

resources.description: Blueprint-scoped CPU, GPU, memory, and LLM token usage samples.

streams.description: Named data or event streams exposed by the blueprint.

metadata.llm_agent_role: Safety observation and human-activity escalation agent.
metadata.name: Facility Safety Monitor Assistant
metadata.output: Human detection events, observable appearance and activity descriptions, alert decisions, and notification payloads.

final_artifact.description: The durable user-facing artifact should summarize the result, recommendation, confidence, evidence, next steps, and source references.

output_contract.stdout: single JSON object, event envelope, or bundle path

metadata.problem_solved: Video monitoring is continuous, noisy, and operationally sensitive; teams need stateful alerts, cooldowns, and explainable observations rather than raw frames.

quick_test.description: Quick test mode shortens the sample interval, disables Slack, and uses mock human detection unless OLLAMA_LIVE_IN_QUICK_TEST=1.

metadata.simulation_type: Video stream sampling with alert state.

standard.execution_model: load_metadata -> resolve_config -> load_inputs -> start_run_store -> observe_simulation_state -> call_llm_agent -> evaluate_workflow_state -> route_by_context -> request_human_input -> apply_decision_to_simulation -> emit_events -> write_final_artifact -> fan_out_output_skills

metadata.target_user: Facilities, security, safety operations, and property management teams.

arguments.browser_publish_source: MediaMTX browser webcam publisher URL, defaulting to the local-camera publish page with H.264 video and no audio for local testing.
arguments.browser_video_source: MediaMTX WebRTC preview URL, defaulting to http://127.0.0.1:8889/local-camera/ for local testing.
arguments.run_id: MirrorNeuron run id used to resolve ~/.mn/runs/<run_id>.
arguments.url: Shared support Gradio app URL written to web_ui.json.

web_ui.description: Shared blueprint support Gradio dashboard that shows this blueprint's configured live camera source beside streamed safety events from the shared run store.

name: Facility Safety Monitor Assistant

workers.role: Resolve mock, JSON, file, or env_json inputs

ingress.description: Continuously sample a 24/7 door camera or local webcam stream, ask the configured VL model whether a human is visible, describe observable appearance and activity, and send Slack alerts when a human is detected.

workers.role: Write result and final artifact to the local run store

primary.role: Safety observation and face-description escalation agent.

steps.goal: Resolve the selected input adapter and record input provenance.
steps.label: Load Inputs

steps.goal: Video monitoring is continuous, noisy, and operationally sensitive; teams need stateful alerts, cooldowns, and explainable observations rather than raw frames.
steps.label: Run Workflow

steps.goal: Persist result.json, final_artifact.json, events, logs, and optional output-skill fan-out records.
steps.label: Write Final Artifact
